🧪 Improvement Modal Testing Helper

Use this tool to manually test the localStorage persistence functionality for the improvement modal.

📋 Current localStorage State

🔧 Simulate Improvement States

🎯 Test Scenarios

📖 Instructions

  1. Open the Agents Manager dashboard in another tab
  2. Navigate to a workspace detail page
  3. Use this tool to set up localStorage state
  4. Refresh the dashboard page
  5. Verify the improvement modal behavior
  6. Check that localStorage is cleared appropriately
